# sakura_apprun_dedicated_load_balancer_service_class (Data Source)

Information about a specific load balancer service class for AppRun Dedicated

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sakura_apprun_load_balancer_service_class" "example" {
  name = "example-class-name"
}

output "lb_service_class_path" {
  value = data.sakura_apprun_load_balancer_service_class.example.path
}

output "lb_service_class_node_count" {
  value = data.sakura_apprun_load_balancer_service_class.example.node_count
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the load balancer service class

### Read-Only

- `node_count` (Number) The number of nodes assigned
- `path` (String) The service class path
